title: Item Name Gradients
description: Style item names with gradients based on rarity or custom settings.
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2f8c5d8b066736cfef922ce944a9be87864d2e4e.png)

Item Name Gradients adds customizable color gradients to item names in Minecraft. You can assign default gradients to rarities or set unique palettes for individual items.
